title: ranunculus tenebrosus
intro: Ranunculus tenebrosus, also known as dark-flowered buttercup, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant contains ranunculin, a toxic compound with medicinal properties, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ranunculus tenebrosus include its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots or rhizomes are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its toxic compounds require proper handling and caution.
